caption: The video features a man sitting in front of a microphone, likely recording a podcast or radio show. He is wearing a green cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with bold text that reads "I ON NEVER DO SHIT." The setting appears to be a casual, personal space, possibly a home studio, as indicated by the framed photographs on the wall behind him and the clothing racks in the background. The man seems engaged in conversation, speaking into the microphone with a focused expression. The environment suggests a relaxed yet professional atmosphere, with various personal items and memorabilia adding character to the room. The logo in the corner indicates that this is part of the "Boss Talk 101" podcast series.
